title: tricalysia trilocularis
intro: Tricalysia trilocularis, also known as the three-celled Tricalysia, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Tricalysia trilocularis include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or ointment for topical application.
